evals.prompt: 我的 openclaw 突然启动不了了，Gateway 一直在报错说端口被占用，怎么解决？
evals.expected_output: Skill should route to ops/fix.md, diagnose port conflict, check gateway troubleshooting docs and active experiences, suggest solution (kill competing process or change port).

evals.prompt: 我刚装了 openclaw 但不知道怎么配置 telegram channel，需要什么步骤？
evals.expected_output: Skill should route to ops/configure.md, guide through channels config, reference telegram channel docs in official-docs/providers/.

evals.prompt: openclaw 模型一直不回消息，是不是 api key 配置有问题？
evals.expected_output: Skill should route to ops/fix.md, classify as providers/model issue, check model status, guide debugging api key configuration.

evals.prompt: 我用的 NixOS，怎么在 openclaw 里装插件？
evals.expected_output: Skill should route to ops/install.md (Nix path) + ops/configure.md (plugins), reference official-docs/install/ and official-docs/plugins/.

evals.prompt: openclaw 更新到最新版后 sandbox 报错，之前都能用的
evals.expected_output: Skill should route to ops/update.md first (version change detected), sync docs, run bug audit, then route to ops/fix.md for the sandbox issue.
